violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the bar dish machine was in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Technician is in process of obtaining new machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The dish washing machine in the kitchen is in poor repair, non-functional at the time of inspection. Technician arrived during last inspection; parts on order. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the kitchen cookline. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Technician arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The dish machine in the kitchen was observed non-functional. PIC stated motor was broken. Technician arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
A pipe from an unknown source was observed dripping into a container at the bar area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The floor and wall in the fryer area have an accumulation of soil residue and debris; floors behind kitchen equipment and mop sink area have an accumulation of debris and old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
